turns.name: Live event summary
turns.user: Pick one reachable Windows host or DC in this session and pull a compact reboot plus authentication-failure summary for the last 24 hours.

turns.name: Plain English explanation
turns.user: Explain those findings in plain English for an admin reading fast. No raw tool wording.

turns.name: Likely story
turns.user: Correlate the reboot and authentication evidence into the most likely story, and mention what seems related versus coincidental.

turns.name: Confidence and uncertainty
turns.user: Separate confirmed facts from best-guess hypotheses, include confidence, and name one missing check that would reduce uncertainty.

turns.name: Blunt handoff
turns.user: Give me the blunt operator handoff in 4 bullets: issue, evidence, confidence, next step.
